subject: [SDNC] Bump SDNC and CCSDK versions for London release
commit_message:
[SDNC] Bump SDNC and CCSDK versions for London release

Bump versions of SDNC and CCSDK docker images for London release,
bump sdnc version to 2.5.2 to resolve gating issues
bump sdnc version to 2.5.3 to add missing Bierman API karaf feature
bump sdnc version to 2.5.5 to resolve HTTP PATCH issue
ueb-listener to use sdc-distr-client 2.0.0 (kafka native)
Use Strimzi KafkaUser template

Issue-ID: CCSDK-3876
Issue-ID: CCSDK-1789
Issue-ID: CCSDK-3908
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>
Change-Id: I053058f09bad1f5d1578979134eed43eee1d76eb

Patch Set 8:

Failing SDNC health check might be related to legacy Biermann restonf implementation which is not supported. Now RFC 8040 implementation is available `/restconf/operations` --> `/rests/operations`.
From my point of view healthcheck should based on this URL:

curl -X POST -u admin:Kp8bJ4SXszM0WXlhak3eHlcse2gAw84vaoGGmJvUy2U "https://sdnc.onap:8282/rests/operations/SLI-API:healthcheck" -H "accept: application/xml" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"input\":{}}" 

Dan knows more about this.

Patch Set 9:

Sorry .. was on vacation last week and missed some comments below.

In London, the intent was to still support the older Biermann version of RESTCONF but to deprecate it.  It is no longer supported in OpenDaylight Chlorine itself, but we took a version of that code in CCSDK and ported it to Chlorine ourselves.  However, I did not install that feature in this submission.  I'll create a new image with that version installed and bump the version and that should clear these issues for now.  

In Montreal, we plan to remove support for the older format to be consistent with the ODL supported version, so at least this oversight helped identify what changes will be needed.
